creator: linus.sundqvist@loopia.se
text:
Created attachment 219853
grafana7-7.1.3.log

Trying to build www/grafana7 results in a checksum error for one dependency package for (at least) FreeBSD 11.3 and 12.2 2020Q4. Seems to works fine in head however. Maybe the solution is to just push the version in head into quarterly?

Checksum mismatch for codahale-hdrhistogram-3a0bb77429bd_GH0.tar.gz

Attaching build-log from 12.2 2020Q4.
